headline: New Cognizant Research Reveals $4.7 Trillion in Untapped AI Value Across G2000
summary: Cognizant (NASDAQ: CTSH) today released new research showing that AI's real-world results depend less on the technology itself than on the maturity of a company's tech infrastructure and where it directs its investment. The companies getting this right are generating financial returns measurable in the billions.
